About.p1: Something that started as a simple passion evolved with a lot of work and love into a project in which I don't just dedicate my time. I love to capture special moments for you. Whether it's just a portrait, a concert, a birthday, or a wedding, each project is approached with attention to detail, quality, and seriousness to offer the best final product I can create.
About.p2: My name is Rapa Mihai Florin, a photographer specialized in portrait, concert, studio, and event photography. I look forward to immortalizing your special moment!
